utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I like this one . It seems to say , " I love you and that is why I have to kill you . "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: They can not all be bad . Find the one where you make your bedroom eyes . Ohh , there it is .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I like this one . It seems to say , " I love you and that is why I have to kill you . "

utterances.speaker: Chandler

utterances.speaker: Kyle
utterances.text: Hey uh , I do not mean to be presumptuous but I have these two tickets to the ballroom dancing finals tomorrow night if you want to go ?

utterances.speaker: Kyle

utterances.text: Okay , I know . Hold on . Hey Ross ?

utterances.text: Yeah , umm that is Whitney , Kyle ex ... wife out there , now do you think that you can you know divert her so that we can slip out ?
